sections.label: Macro
sections.body: Chop tape on the majors with BNB carrying a 12% one-day move that masks weakness underneath. Weekly breadth collapsed to 5/20 green, the thinnest read of the cycle. Spot BTC ETFs bled nine sessions running for $2.8B total. The Iran deal sits in pending-approval limbo, semis flagged for FOMO de-risking. The risk-on extension is fragile.

sections.label: Perps
sections.body: Leverage building across the universe — three ACCUMULATION prints (HYPE, BNB, ASTER) and two MOMENTUM prints (HEI, H) on twenty NEUTRAL, with zero distribution or capitulation. PORTAL fired +54% on OI +628% but taker buy 49.85% blocked the breakout gate by one point. LAB carries the deepest short-pay at -0.14%/8h funding without taker confirmation, ZachXBT's insider-supply flag this morning re-frames the move as manufactured.

sections.label: Book
sections.body: Four longs open after this morning's HYPE promotion. ICP and SEI are structural multi-week holds away from today's perps slice. INJ day 2 of 3 cooled from +10.8% to +3.7% on the day but holds well above stop. HYPE day-of confirmed by $30M/day ETF inflows and volume surpassing NASDAQ. Adding BNB on the morning watchlist trigger firing clean.

market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · ride the BNB ETF capital landing through the June 1 announcement, hold HYPE through the AI-bubble trail signal. Sector concentration heavy — let ASTER and H confirm into watchlist before adding.

current_positions.thesis_note: Multi-week supply-deflation thesis intact; absent from perps slice on a structural hold.
current_positions.watch: second daily close below $2.70 with the AI-compute cohort red into US close marks the structural break before the stop fires

current_positions.thesis_note: June 15 EVM migration sits 16 days out; catalyst window still ahead with stop 10% below.
current_positions.watch: L1 cohort behavior into the June 15 EVM migration — a daily close below $0.066 with SUI and APT red breaks the catalyst-positioning thesis

current_positions.thesis_note: Day 2 of 3. Cooled from morning's +10.8% to +3.7% but 7d carries +24.6% and stop sits 21% below.
current_positions.watch: horizon expires tomorrow with the AI cohort already fragmenting (NEAR -6%, RENDER +8.5%) — a clean close above $6.80 holds the trade into close, a flush back to $6.20 closes early

current_positions.thesis_note: Day-of confirmation: $30M/day ETF inflows, volume surpasses NASDAQ, HIP-4 prediction markets challenging Polymarket.
current_positions.watch: the late-stage AI-bubble trail signal — DataChaz's 12.7k-like jobs-walkback marks peak self-awareness; a daily close below $63 with the perp-DEX bid rotating off trending fires the trail

thesis: BNB cleared the $685 trigger on a 12% one-day move with volume 4.6x the recent average. The breakout fired with confirmation flow behind it, not against it.
Open interest exploded 42% in 24 hours and taker buy crossed 52% — directional flow joining the move rather than fading into it.
VanEck's first US spot BNB ETF launched with a June 1 announcement window. Institutional product lands on an exchange token for the first time.
Short liquidations printed $7.5M against a 7d 75th-percentile of $359K with funding flipping negative — shorts pay longs while supply compresses.
risks: Smart money long/short cut from 1.50 to 1.22 over the week — fast money is reducing exposure into the rally as retail piles in.
ETF launch trades often sell the news within 48 hours of the headline crossing the wire. June 1 is the test.
The 42% one-day OI build is a large stack to unwind. A sharp reversal hits a loaded long position and flushes hard.

watchlist.trigger: close above $0.85 on 24h volume holding above 2x the 7d average
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.68 before the trigger fires
thesis: ASTER fired fresh ACCUMULATION on +14.66% 24h with taker buy 53.01% — the directional flow gate cleared on a first-day universe entrant.
The BNB-chain rotation is the cleanest organic bid on the board today, with ASTER named as the CEX-ecosystem adjacent to the spot ETF playbook.
Smart money L/S 2.44 down 0.41 over 7 days reads as distribution into retail demand — a reclaim of $0.85 with smart money rejoining confirms the rotation extends.

watchlist.trigger: pullback to the $0.30 demand zone with funding holding under +0.05%/8h on the dip, then a reclaim of $0.40 on volume above the recent average
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.28 before the trigger fires
thesis: H fired MOMENTUM on +86% 7d with funding +0.05%/8h inside the breakout band and OI building 45% in 24 hours.
The identity-AI lane fires alongside Worldcoin's +25% — sector confluence, not single-asset froth.
Top trader L/S 2.45 reads as crowded long this early in the cycle — late-entry fade risk explicit on a +37% 24h leg without a pullback to absorb.

watchlist.trigger: next session taker buy prints above 52% with the +54% 24h leg holding into the daily close
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.009 before the trigger fires
thesis: PORTAL fired +54% on a fresh listing with OI +628% and funding at -0.33%/8h — the deepest short-pay across the perps universe today.
Taker buy 49.85% sits one point under the breakout-confirmation gate — buying is not yet absorbing the rip on the spread.
A second-day taker print above 52% with the +54% intact confirms continuation rather than a leverage-led blow-off; without it the fresh listing flushes.

evaluations.note: Day 4/multi-week PM eval. ICP absent from today's PM perps slice (universe rotation dropped TAO/BCH/FIL and added H/ASTER/PORTAL/ONDO). Carrying $2.72 from outcome-tracker; MISSION70 supply-deflation thesis is structural and multi-week, not narrative-dependent. The $2.65 stop sits 3% below. RIDE on tight watch — a second close below $2.70 with the AI-compute cohort red into close marks the structural break.

Day 4/multi-week PM eval. SEI absent from today's PM perps slice — carrying $0.0691 from outcome-tracker. The June 15 EVM migration sits 16 days out, catalyst window still ahead. Position flat near entry with the $0.062 stop 10% below. RIDE.

Day 2/3 PM eval. INJ $6.647 cooled from morning's +10.8% 24h to +3.42% on the PM print but holds 7d +24.57% with funding -0.02%/8h still paying longs. Vol/mcap leadership held morning to PM. Up +11% from entry, $5.20 stop 21% below. Horizon expires tomorrow — RIDE through the final session, a clean close above $6.80 holds the trade in.

Day 0/multi-week PM eval — opened this morning at $66.41 with HYPE now $67.736 (+2.0% intraday). PM AIXBT confirms $30M/day ETF inflows, volume surpasses NASDAQ, HIP-4 prediction markets challenging Polymarket. ACCUMULATION CONFIRMED sub-tag intact, OI +24% 7d, smart money L/S +0.01 delta. The supply-crunch thesis paying off real-time. $58 stop sits 14% below. RIDE.

invalidation_conditions.trigger_label: parabola gives back half — fresh-listing flush

thesis: PORTAL fired +54% on a fresh listing with OI +628% and funding at -0.33%/8h — the deepest short-pay across the perps universe today.
Taker buy 49.85% sits one point under the breakout-confirmation gate — buying not yet absorbing the rip on the spread.

named_risks: Fresh listings with OI building 600%+ in a day often flush hard when the leverage stack rolls — the trigger is asymmetric, wait for confirmation.

drop_watchlist.note: ZachXBT named insider-supply concentration on LAB this morning, surfacing in token-call's exclusion logic. The setup was waiting for taker buy above 52% confirmation; today's PM perps print held at 51.35% under the gate. With the manufactured-signal flag now confirmed, the asymmetry has flipped — chasing a pump verified as supply-concentrated breaks the soul standing frame on organic vs manufactured signal, regardless of whether the taker gate clears tomorrow.
